highContrast.title: High contrast
highContrast.description: Improves readability of text and borders.

kitchenMode.title: Kitchen mode
kitchenMode.description: Stronger contrast and clearer surfaces for everyday cooking.

largeText.title: Large text
largeText.description: Increases base font and UI sizing for better readability.

reducedMotion.title: Reduce motion
reducedMotion.description: Minimizes animations for calmer, focused use.

compactDensity.title: Compact density
compactDensity.description: Fits more on screen — great for kitchen tablets.

nutritionBadges.title: Nutrition badges
nutritionBadges.description: Shows nutrition hints in recipe lists and details.

highContrast.title: High contrast
highContrast.description: Improves readability of text and borders.

kitchenMode.title: Kitchen mode
kitchenMode.description: Stronger contrast and clearer surfaces for everyday cooking.

largeText.title: Large text
largeText.description: Increases base font and UI sizing for better readability.

apiKey.title: Gemini API key
apiKey.replacePlaceholder: Enter a new key to replace the current one...
apiKey.securityNotice: Your API key is stored only locally on your device, encrypted in IndexedDB. It is never sent to our servers, only directly to the Google Gemini API. This alone does not protect against XSS on the same origin.

status.configured: API key configured - AI features active
status.missing: No API key - AI features disabled

apiKey.howToTitle: How to get an API key:

steps.signIn: Sign in with your Google account
steps.copy: Copy the key and paste it above
steps.recommendation: Recommendation: Restrict the key in Google Cloud to https://qnbs.github.io/*

confirm.title: Remove API key?
confirm.description: The stored API key will be removed and AI features will be disabled.

validation.invalid: This doesn't look like a valid Google API key.

speech.testPhrase: Hello! I am your personal kitchen assistant.

community.title: Community sharing (opt-in)
community.helper: Recipes are shared only on request. No automatic publishing. IPFS is public, Nostr can be self-hosted.

healthConnect.title: Health Connect
healthConnect.helper: The data is calculated and exported locally only. No upload, no cloud.

aiChef.title: AI creativity
aiChef.customInstructionPlaceholder: e.g. "I have children, please avoid spicy seasonings" or "I love garlic"

balanced.label: Balanced
balanced.desc: Good balance of tradition and modern ideas.

modules.workspaceHint: Pantry, recipe book, shopping, and cook mode live under “Household”.

policy.title: Household & allergy policies
policy.strictEnforcementDesc: Blocks AI suggestions containing forbidden allergens.

pwa.title: Progressive Web App
pwa.description: Installation, offline cache, and platform integration.
pwa.iosInstallHint: On iPhone/iPad: Share → Add to Home Screen. CulinaSync opens like a native app.

vault.title: Encrypted offline archive
vault.helper: Same encryption as cloud sync (AES-GCM). For pantry/recipes, the newer `updatedAt` record wins on conflict.
vault.toastImportError: Import failed — check passphrase or file.
vault.mergeReport: Skipped (older): pantry {{pantry}}, recipes {{recipes}}. Meal plan: {{plan}}, shopping: {{shopping}} entries applied.

sync.title: Cloud sync (end-to-end encrypted)
sync.helper: All data is encrypted locally before upload. The password never leaves your device. WebDAV/NextCloud: use a `.csb` file target.

nextcloud.remotePathHint: File name in your Nextcloud files folder

deviceSync.sectionHint: Pantry and recipes (max. 40 each) as QR or text code — for quick transfer between devices on the same network.
deviceSync.title: QR device sync
deviceSync.description: Scan the code on the other device or paste the text code. Older entries are not overwritten.
deviceSync.qrTooLarge: Payload too large for QR — use text code or vault file.

reset.title: Delete data permanently?
reset.description: All recipes, pantry items, and settings will be removed. This action cannot be undone.

localAi.stackDescription: WebLLM → ONNX → Transformers.js → heuristic — automatic fallback on weak hardware.
localAi.enabledDesc: Uses on-device inference when models are available.
localAi.localOnlyDesc: Blocks all cloud calls — maximum privacy.
localAi.cloudFallbackDesc: Optionally use Gemini (BYOK) if local inference fails.
localAi.preferWebGpuDesc: Fastest path on modern GPUs; otherwise WASM fallback.
localAi.visionDesc: ONNX/CLIP for photo recognition without cloud.
localAi.embeddingsDesc: Semantic search over your recipes and pantry.
localAi.cacheDesc: Caches responses with TTL in IndexedDB.
localAi.ollamaEnabledDesc: Optionally use local server models on your machine.
localAi.privacyNotice: With local use, your household data never leaves the device. Cloud paths only use your own API key.

privacy.title: Privacy & data
privacy.subtitle: You control what is stored, shared, or deleted.
privacy.analyticsDesc: Prepared for optional anonymized usage stats — no active telemetry backend yet.
privacy.diagnosticsDesc: Technical metadata only, no API keys.
privacy.redactPiiDesc: Reduces names and free text in error logs.
privacy.persistPromptsDesc: Enables history and cache — on this device only.
privacy.clearCacheDesc: Deletes inference cache on factory reset.
privacy.localFirstDesc: CulinaSync is built for offline and device-first use. Cloud AI stays optional.
privacy.resetHint: Full data wipe: “Data & storage” → factory reset.

workspace.pantryGroupedDesc: Groups items in the pantry view.
workspace.lowStockDesc: Marks items below your policy thresholds.
workspace.checkedBottomDesc: Moves completed items to the end.
workspace.varietyDesc: Avoids repeating the same dishes too often.
workspace.expiryPlanDesc: Plans meals using soon-to-expire ingredients first.
workspace.cookAiDesc: Step help, substitutions, and timing (when a model is available).
workspace.cookAutoAdvanceDesc: Moves to the next step when a timer ends.
workspace.cookTimerSoundDesc: Plays a sound when timers finish.
workspace.cookChecklistDesc: Shows a checkable ingredient list beside steps.

panelIntro.ariaLabel: Short guide for this settings area

appearance.lead: Tune look & feel for your kitchen — accent, kitchen mode, and accessibility apply across the app instantly.
appearance.tip1: Kitchen mode boosts contrast for steam, glare, and distance from the screen.
appearance.tip2: Reduce motion turns off animations for calmer use.
appearance.tip3: The live preview shows buttons and badges with your accent color.

modules.lead: Household basics: language, display name, week start, and default servings.
modules.tip1: Language updates UI and exports immediately.
modules.tip2: Default servings pre-fill new meal plan entries.

workspace.lead: Per-area fine tuning — pantry, recipes, shopping, planner, and cook mode.
workspace.tip1: Expiry warnings help use food before it spoils.
workspace.tip2: Auto-categorize speeds up adding pantry items.
workspace.tip3: Cook mode options optimize type size and focus while cooking.

ai.lead: AI Chef preferences: creativity, diet, cuisines, and system instruction.
ai.tip1: Policies (allergens) also filter AI suggestions when enabled.
ai.tip2: Context toggles control pantry/plan inclusion in requests.
ai.tip3: Cloud Gemini needs an API key under API key.

localAi.lead: Local models via Ollama — routing, GPU tier, and cache for privacy-first AI.
localAi.tip1: Run Ollama on the same machine or LAN before picking models.
localAi.tip2: Smaller models are faster; larger ones structure recipes better.
localAi.tip3: Cloud Gemini can stay parallel — routing decides per request.

policies.lead: Household safety rules: allergens, blacklist, minimum stock, enforcement.
policies.tip1: Strict mode blocks risky recipes early in selection.
policies.tip2: Blacklist entries are comma-separated — e.g. “cilantro, celery”.
policies.tip3: Combine with AI Chef diet tags for best matches.

privacy.lead: Transparency on data traces: analytics prep, logs, AI prompts, and local-first guarantees.
privacy.tip1: Analytics/diagnostics are prepared — no third-party tracking is sent without your consent.
privacy.tip2: PII redaction masks sensitive parts in local error logs.
privacy.tip3: Factory reset is under Data & storage — not here.

speech.lead: Speech output and input: browser voices, local Whisper or cloud, volume, continuous listening.
speech.tip1: Test TTS before starting cook mode.
speech.tip2: Whisper stays on-device — great without network at the stove.
speech.tip3: Destructive voice commands can require confirmation.

apikey.lead: Bring-your-own-key for Google Gemini — encrypted local storage only.
apikey.tip1: Restrict the key in Google Cloud to your deployment domain.
apikey.tip2: Without a key, cloud AI stays off; the rest of the app keeps running.
apikey.tip3: Rotate keys regularly and remove on device handoff.

health.lead: Export calculated nutrition per recipe for Apple Health, Google Fit, or Samsung Health.
health.tip1: Everything is computed locally — no upload to our cloud.
health.tip2: CSV suits spreadsheets; JSON suits automation.
health.tip3: Pick the target format your health app expects.

community.lead: Opt-in sharing of single recipes via IPFS or Nostr — never automatic.
community.tip1: IPFS content is public — share anonymized recipes only.
community.tip2: Nostr can be self-hosted for more control.

data.lead: Core of data sovereignty: PWA, backup, vault, device sync, cloud, and reset.
data.tip3: QR sync is fastest for two devices on the same Wi‑Fi.
